knownIssues: SCOPE LIMITATION: M16 is PR/Media — does not detect /insights/blogs or content marketing pages (by design, adding 'blog' would flood with false positives on every WordPress site)
article_count is a heuristic — counts CSS elements matching .card etc., not actual press releases. Ryder newsroom has more content loaded dynamically/paginated that passive HTML can't see
The mm-card CMS pattern is not in the selector list — .card catches it incidentally but fragile
